emergency_definition: pipes, toilets, drains—all kinds of issues

non_emergency_routing_rules.details: during business hours, Monday-Friday 7 AM to 5 PM Mountain Time

after_hours_flow_summary: calls go to on-call technician, $125 service call, parts and labor at standard rates, quoted before work starts
notes: Client has cast iron drain lines that will need replacement in 30-40 years, high water pressure, and a stiff main shutoff valve that should be replaced. Scheduled maintenance starts April 1st, $600 per month for four visits per year, priority emergency response, and 24/7 emergency line.
